headline: McKesson (MCK) Q4 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Brian Tyler: Thank you, Jeni.  In our fiscal 2026, we grew adjusted earnings per diluted share by 18%, driven by momentum across our strategic growth platforms.  At the beginning of the year, we added Core Ventures and PRISM Vision to our oncology and our multispecialty platforms.

headline: Assessing McKesson (MCK) Valuation After Fiscal 2026 Earnings And Sector Volatility
summary: McKesson (MCK) is back in focus after reporting full year results for the period ended March 31, 2026, with sales of US$403.43b and net income of US$4.76b, along with higher earnings per share. See our latest analysis for McKesson. Despite the latest results, McKesson’s share price has had a weak patch recently. It delivered a 1-day share price return of 1.49% after a 30-day share price decline of 11.89% and a 90-day share price decline of 20.44%. However, the 5-year total shareholder return...

headline: MCK Stock Falls Despite Q4 Earnings Beat, Sales Miss, Margins Up

headline: Does McKesson's (MCK) Bigger Credit Line Quietly Redefine Its Capital Allocation Priorities?
summary: In the past quarter, McKesson Corporation reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 sales of US$96.30 billion and net income of US$1.68 billion, with full-year sales reaching US$403.43 billion and net income of US$4.76 billion, alongside a new US$5.00 billion multi-currency revolving credit facility maturing in 2031. The combination of higher earnings per share from continuing operations and expanded committed liquidity gives investors more information about McKesson’s capacity to fund operations,...
